hero.title: Smart Textbook Scanner
hero.description: Scan textbook material, organize pages, extract notes, and review focused study points.

flow.title: Overview → Scan → Organize → Extract → Review
steps: Review extraction progress and recent notes

differences.title: Move from textbook pages to focused review notes
differences.description: Smart Textbook Scanner turns page text into structured scans, organized pages, extracted notes, and a review summary inside the Ansiversa shell.

items.title: Scan
items.description: Create current-user textbook scans with subject, source, and study goal.

items.title: Organize
items.description: Add page text under each scan and keep page status clear.

items.title: Review
items.description: Extract notes from pages and review extraction progress across scans.

feel.title: A focused path from page capture to review
feel.description: The workflow keeps textbook scans, pages, and extracted notes in one study workspace.

technicalSection.title: Workflow-ready for Astra review
technicalSection.description: Smart Textbook Scanner follows the shared Ansiversa mini-app architecture and remains unapproved until Astra and Partner review are complete.
items: Current-user owned TextbookScans, TextbookPages, and ExtractedNotes tables.
Typed React service layer, Zustand store, route-aware action buttons, and responsive module routes.
